headline: Lockheed Martin hits jackpot as defense spending stays strong
summary: Six nations. One training system. A contract that runs to 2031. And it is only one of two awards Lockheed Martin secured in a single day. The Pentagon's May 28 contract announcements add another layer to what has become one of the most sustained defense award cycles Lockheed Martin has seen in ...

headline: Assessing Lockheed Martin (LMT) Valuation After Recent Share Pullback And Space Growth Narrative
summary: Event overview and recent share performance Lockheed Martin (LMT) has drawn investor attention after recent trading left the stock at a last close of US$530.45, with performance mixed over different time frames. The share price fell 1.3% over the past day and slipped 0.5% over the past week, while rising about 4.0% over the past month. Over the past 3 months the stock declined 19.4%, although the 1 year total return stands at 12.97%. See our latest analysis for Lockheed Martin. Short term...

headline: What Might The Federal Reserve Decide After May 2026's Job Report?
summary: May jobs report preview: expected payroll gains, Fed rate outlook, AI-driven job losses, plus top picks (FDX, XPO, UPS) and weak food stocks. See more here.
